zh.lifeSummary: Katherine St Omer是Thomas de St Omer和Beatrice de la Ryere的女兒，於1345年之後出生在英國諾福爾可布盧達爾。她於1359年與Sir John de Berners在英國素瑞韋斯特 霍斯利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1403年在英國素瑞韋斯特 霍斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Katherine St Omer是Thomas de St Omer和Beatrice de la Ryere的女儿，于1345年之后出生在英国諾福爾可布盧達爾。她于1359年与Sir John de Berners在英国素瑞韋斯特 霍斯利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1403年在英国素瑞韋斯特 霍斯利。

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Southern French: variant of   St  .   Romain  .

variants.name: Romain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Alain, Altagrace, Aurore, Camille, Dominique, Edele, Georges, Henri, Jacques, Jean-Marie, Jean-Michel, Jeanmarie.
French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and English: variant of   Roman  .

nameMeanings.name: Omer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Ahmed, Mohamed, Mohammed, Tarig, Mohammad, Murad, Abdirahman, Abdul, Abdulla, Abdulrahim, Ali, Amin.

variants.name: Omar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Mohammed, Mohamed, Ali, Omar, Ahmed, Ahmad, Hassan, Abdul, Husam, Khalid, Mohammad, Mohd.

Muslim: from the Arabic personal name Omar of uncertain etymology, found almost exclusively among Sunni Muslims. It is thought to be related to Arabic ʿāmir ‘prosperous, full of life, large, substantial’ (see Amir 2). The root word ʿumr means ‘life’. ʿUmar bin al-Khaṭṭāb was the second of the ‘rightly guided’ caliphs (ruled 634–44); he was known by the title al-Fārūq ‘the distinguisher’, i.e. one who distinguishes between truth and falsehood. Compare Omer and Umar .
Catalan: topographic name for someone who lived by a group of elm trees, from the collective form of om ‘elm’.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of Katherine , derived from the pet form Kit + the hypocoristic suffix -y. It is also used as an independent given name.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Katherine St Omer was born after 1345, in Brundall, Norfolk, England as the daughter of Thomas de St Omer and Beatrice de la Ryere. She married Sir John de Berners in 1359, in West Horsley, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1403, in West Horsley, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Katherine St Omer est née après 1345, à Brundall, Norfolk, Angleterre, fille de Thomas de St Omer et Beatrice de la Ryere. Elle a épousé Sir John de Berners en 1359, à West Horsley, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1403, à West Horsley, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Katherine St Omer wurde nach 1345 in Brundall, Norfolk, England, als Tochter von Thomas de St Omer und Beatrice de la Ryere geboren. Sie hat 1359 in West Horsley, Surrey, England Sir John de Berners geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1403 in West Horsley, Surrey, England.

it.lifeSummary: Katherine St Omer è nata il dopo il 1345 nel Brundall, Norfolk, England come figlia di Thomas de St Omer e Beatrice de la Ryere. Lei sposato Sir John de Berners nel 1359, nel West Horsley, Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1403, nel West Horsley, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine St Omerは1345年以後にイギリスノーフォルクブルンダルでThomas de St OmerとBeatrice de la Ryereの娘として生まれた。1359年にイギリススリーウエスト ホールスリーでSir John de Bernersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1403年にイギリススリーウエスト ホールスリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine St Omer(은)는 1345년 이후 영국 노르폴크 브런달에서 Thomas de St Omer(와)과 Beatrice de la Ryere의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1359년 영국 수리 웨스트 호르슬리에서 Sir John de Berners(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1403년 영국 수리 웨스트 호르슬리에서 사망했다.

mn.Writtle, Chelmsford, Essex, England: Writtle, Ēastseaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Katherine St Omer nasceu após 1345, em Brundall, Norfolk, Inglaterra filha de Thomas de St Omer e Beatrice de la Ryere. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Berners em 1359, em West Horsley, Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1403, em West Horsley, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Katherine St Omer родилась после 1345 г. в местности брундалл, норфолк, Англия. Её родителей звали Thomas de St Omer и Beatrice de la Ryere. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Berners в 1359 г. в местности вест хаурсли, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1403 г. в местности вест хаурсли, сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Katherine St Omer nació después de 1345, en Brundall, Norfolk, Inglaterra como hija de Thomas de St Omer y Beatrice de la Ryere. Se casó con Sir John de Berners en 1359, en West Horsley, Surrey, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1403, en West Horsley, Surrey, Inglaterra.
